title.purpose: World section heading and city labels.

clock.purpose: Realtime HH:MM:SS with tabular numerals — the glance target.

motion.name: atmosphere-drift
motion.purpose: Slow field movement; remove under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Stage entrance via transform only; content remains visible by default.

motion.name: settle
motion.purpose: Staggered zone/world settle via translateY; never animate opacity so local dimming works.

motion.name: local-highlight
motion.purpose: Opacity and scale transition when marking the local Indonesia zone.

components.name: Brand Wordmark
components.description: Hero-level Waktu mark above the clocks — Fraunces on Field Lime.
components.css: .ds-brand { margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 9vw, 5rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1; color: #14200a; text-align: center; }

components.name: Indonesia Zone Clock
components.description: WIB/WITA/WIT block: label, name, tabular time, date.
components.html:
WIB

Waktu Indonesia Barat

14:32:08

Kamis, 9 Juli 2026
components.css: .ds-zone { text-align: center; color: #14200a; } .ds-zone-label { margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; } .ds-zone-name { margin: 0.4rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.2rem); font-weight: 500; color: #2a3d14; } .ds-clock { display: block; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 10vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; color: #14200a; } .ds-date { margin: 0.85rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.8vw, 1.35rem); font-weight: 500; color: #2a3d14; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Local Zone Clock
components.description: Emphasized local Indonesia zone — larger type, full ink, scale 1.08.
components.html:

components.css: .ds-zone--local { text-align: center; color: #14200a; transform: scale(1.08); } .ds-zone--local .ds-zone-label { margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 5.5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; } .ds-zone--local .ds-zone-name { margin: 0.4rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.5vw, 1.35rem); font-weight: 500; color: #14200a; } .ds-zone--local .ds-clock { display: block; margin-top: 1rem; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 13vw, 6rem); font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; color: #14200a; } .ds-zone--local .ds-date { margin: 0.85rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3.2vw, 1.6rem); font-weight: 500; color: #14200a; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.description: Secondary world city cell — quieter than Indonesia zones.

components.css: .ds-world-zone { text-align: center; color: #14200a; } .ds-world-label { margin: 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 3vw, 1.5rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-world-name { margin: 0.3rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 2vw, 1.05rem); font-weight: 500; color: #2a3d14; } .ds-world-clock { display: block; margin-top: 0.65rem; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 5.5vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; color: #14200a; } .ds-world-date { margin: 0.45rem 0 0; font-family: Sora, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 2vw, 1.05rem); font-weight: 500; color: #2a3d14; }

components.name: Atmosphere Field
components.description: Full-bleed lime field with soft radials — the drenched surface.
components.css: .ds-atmosphere { width: 100%; min-height: 12rem; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 85% 65% at 15% 10%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55), transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 55% at 90% 85%, rgba(122, 158, 0, 0.45), transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 50% 45%, rgba(244, 255, 232, 0.35), transparent 65%), linear-gradient(160deg, #c8f520 0%, #b8f000 40%, #9ad400 100%); }

narrative.overview:
Waktu is a wall-facing time surface: one composition, one job, no chrome. The entire viewport is a lime field; dark leaf ink sits on it so time reads at a glance from across a room. Personality is calm, clear, and steady — a quiet fixture, not a product tour.

Density is low and hierarchy is typographic. Fraunces carries place names and the brand; Sora carries the ticking digits. Atmosphere (soft radial light, slow drift, light grain) supports presence without competing with the clock. Local Indonesian zone is scaled up and neighbors dim; world cities sit quieter below.

This system explicitly rejects SaaS marketing pages — hero stacks, feature grids, CTAs, and card chrome that compete with the clock. If a new element would belong on a landing page, it does not belong here.
keyCharacteristics: Drenched Field Lime surface; ink on lime, never lime-on-white cards
Typographic and ambient — type is the UI; no buttons, cards, or nav chrome
Glance hierarchy: brand → local Indonesia zone → other WIB/WITA/WIT → world cities
Flat / tonal depth only — scale, opacity, atmosphere; never drop shadows
Motion is slow and optional; prefers-reduced-motion removes all of it

rules.name: The Drenched Field Rule
rules.body: Field Lime owns 30–100% of the viewport. Never invert to a white/cream page with lime accents.

rules.name: The Ink-On-Lime Rule
rules.body: All readable text uses Field Ink or Field Soft on Field Lime. Never light text on lime, never gray text on lime.

rules.name: The Glance Type Rule
rules.body: Clock digits are the largest continuous text on screen after (or with) the brand. If a decoration out-sizes the clock, delete the decoration.

rules.name: The Tabular Time Rule
rules.body: Every clock uses tabular numerals so digits do not jump as seconds tick.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Drop shadows are forbidden. If depth is needed, use scale, opacity, or atmosphere — never a card shadow.

dos: Do keep Field Lime as the full-bleed body background and Field Ink / Field Soft as the only text colors.
Do make the local Indonesia zone the clearest glance target via scale and sibling dimming.
Do use Fraunces for brand and place labels; Sora + tabular nums for every clock.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: reduce by removing atmosphere drift, rise, fade-in, and local scale.
Do keep letter-spacing on display/clock type at or above -0.04em.
donts: Don't build SaaS marketing pages — hero stacks, feature grids, CTAs, and card chrome that compete with the clock.
Don't use drop shadows, glass cards, or bordered card grids.
Don't put gray body text on lime; Field Soft is the only muted text.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows, numbered section markers, or gradient text.
Don't invent buttons or nav for a glance-only wall display.
